item.title: Palantir Just Opened a New DoD Door—What Changes Now?
item.description: Palantir won DISA Impact Level 6 authorization for sensitive DoD cloud workloads. See why it matters, how commercial growth helps, and key chart level...

item.title: AVGO Earnings Are Just Around the Corner—Here's What to Watch
item.description: Chip behemoth Broadcom is gearing up for its next earnings report. See the key factors that markets will have under a microscope.

item.title: 3 Stocks Under $5 With Strong Analyst Upside Potential
item.description: These three sub-$5 stocks offer high-risk, high-reward potential and are backed by analyst optimism and long-term growth catalysts

item.title: 3 Major Buybacks Just Dropped—Here’s the Signal Investors See
item.description: Walmart, Lyft, and Equitable announced new buybacks. See authorization sizes, what they mean for share count and EPS, plus where analysts see upside.
